rationale: Only approach that catches the evidenced exit-143 case (reaches autodev as a failed terminal, not a signal termination). Reuses the refine-broke-down/autodev-broke-down file handshake and the GATE_FAILED_INFRA reason-token convention. Scored 10/12 vs Option B 2/12.
rule: Option A — sub-loop emits a termination-class sentinel (self-contained in loop layer)
alternatives_rejected: Option B (executor exposes signal/timeout as a distinct on_signal/on_infra route key) — larger blast radius (6+ files) and does not fix the evidenced case on its own since the SIGTERM is absorbed by the child's diagnose state before reaching the _execute_sub_loop else branch.
